mapper.sql: select id, shop_name, avatar, banner, subtitle, invite_cover, invite_text, wechat_qr, alipay_qr, store_name, store_address, business_hours, store_phone, stock_group_qr, stock_group_name, stock_group_notice, announce_enabled, announce_title, announce_content, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark from kitchen_shop
mapper.select: where del_flag = '0' order by id limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into kitchen_shop(shop_name, avatar, banner, subtitle, invite_cover, invite_text, wechat_qr, alipay_qr, store_name, store_address, business_hours, store_phone, stock_group_qr, stock_group_name, stock_group_notice, announce_enabled, announce_title, announce_content, remark, create_time) values(#{shopName}, #{avatar}, #{banner}, #{subtitle}, #{inviteCover}, #{inviteText}, #{wechatQr}, #{alipayQr}, #{storeName}, #{storeAddress}, #{businessHours}, #{storePhone}, #{stockGroupQr}, #{stockGroupName}, #{stockGroupNotice}, #{announceEnabled}, #{announceTitle}, #{announceContent}, #{remark}, sysdate())
